introSection:
Monster Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster that dates back to 1969. It operated from 2001 to 2005 at Family Funland in New Mexico, United States. It was partially erected at Amusement Park Drive In between 2009 and 2011, but had yet to be completed.

The rides serial number was 43 4169.

This was the last remaining Monster Mouse from Allan Herschell Company.
fullText:
